business.name: SAM's Builders & Plumbers Merchants
business.tagline: Your Local Trade Merchant in Birmingham

contact.address: 1 Hob Moor Rd, Small Heath, Birmingham B10 9AY

sample_reviews.author: Tariq M
sample_reviews.text: Great local merchant with a solid range of building and plumbing supplies. Staff are helpful and prices are competitive. My go-to in Small Heath.

sample_reviews.author: James R
sample_reviews.text: Handy location for tradesmen working in the Birmingham area. Good stock of plumbing fittings and always have what I need in a hurry.

sample_reviews.author: Amjad K
sample_reviews.text: SAM's has been reliable for our building projects. Fair prices, friendly counter staff and quick service. Highly recommend to local trades.

brand.usp: SAM's Builders & Plumbers Merchants has been serving the Birmingham trade community with competitively priced building and plumbing supplies from our Small Heath branch. Whether you're a sole trader or a larger contractor, we stock what you need to get the job done.
brand.hero_headline: Trade Supplies Ready When You Need Them
brand.about_paragraph: At SAM's Builders & Plumbers Merchants, we're proud to be a trusted local supplier for tradespeople and self-builders across Birmingham. Based in Small Heath, we stock a wide range of building materials, plumbing fittings, drainage, and more — all at competitive trade prices. We keep things simple: quality products, knowledgeable staff, and a fast, friendly service that keeps your projects moving.
